chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-5571 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For orders on CMA No. 22801/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. Mr. Ghulam Hyder Shaikh, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Siddiq holding brief for Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. ___________________ As per report of MIT-II, the Customs Appellate Tribunal has fixed petitioner’s appeal for hearing today. Therefore, the purpose of the petition is served. Disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
